hypotheses.name: Extended cell-type panel kNN precision@10 + centroid distance matrix
hypotheses.method: For B-cell (n=5), T-cell (n=10), DC (n=5), Plasma (n=2) in-vocab marker sets: compute precision@k=10 at L0, L2, L5, L8, L11. Bootstrap null: 500 random gene sets. Also compute centroid-centroid L2 Euclidean distance matrix at L2.
hypotheses.result_value: B-cell z=7.55 (p=0.000), T-cell z=-1.37 (p=0.972), DC z=-0.87 (p=1.000); centroid dist B-cell-T-cell=4.82, B-cell-DC=6.79, B-cell-Plasma=6.18
hypotheses.next_action: Test NK and Myeloid cell types once larger gene-set vocabulary is available. Also test at Geneformer embeddings for cross-model validation.

hypotheses.name: Held-out B-cell marker generalization (germinal center vs plasma TFs)
hypotheses.method: Reference panel: 5 in-vocab from original 7 B-cell markers (MS4A1, CD19, CD79A, BLK, PRDM1). Held-out set: 17 B-cell/plasma TFs not in reference. For each in-vocab held-out gene (n=7), compute distance to B-cell centroid at L2 and rank vs all-195-gene null distribution. Test across L0-L11.
hypotheses.result_value: BATF=96th pctile, SPIB=94th pctile, BACH2=86th pctile (germinal center TFs close); IRF4=20th pctile, IRF8=44th pctile (plasma/DC TFs far); 3/7 in top quartile
hypotheses.next_action: Expand held-out panel to include PAX5, EBF1, BCL6 by searching wider vocabulary. Quantify the GC-B-cell vs plasma-cell geometric split as a centroid distance: dist(GC-TF-cluster, plasma-TF-cluster).

hypotheses.name: T-cell permutation null + B-cell neighborhood TF scoring
hypotheses.method: Part A: Gene-name permutation null (n=200 permutations) applied to T-cell markers (n=10) at L2 — same protocol as B-cell perm null in iter_0036. Part B: For top-50 B-cell neighbors at L2, count known B-cell TF connections vs random-50-gene baseline (200 trials).
hypotheses.primary_metric: T-cell empirical_p vs perm null; z(neighbors vs random)
hypotheses.result_value: T-cell perm null emp_p=0.96 (not significant, confirming specificity); B-cell neighbor TF z=1.73 vs random (weak positive)
hypotheses.next_action: Download STRING PPI file and rerun Part B with full STRING scores for a quantitative TF-connectivity enrichment test. This would strengthen the neighborhood biological content claim.
